description: NBL format spec and MCM_MITO tag template

mito_tag.template:
<MCM_MITO>
v{version} | Task:{task_id} | WF:{workflow} | Collab:{collab_mode}
NBL: {nbl_line}
Pins: {pin_count} active | Compress at {compress_pct_int}% budget
Rule: Trust NBL for spatial reasoning | Compress naturally at limit
</MCM_MITO>
mito_tag.note: Agents treat this tag as internal biology, not an external tool call. Insert at messages[1].
